notes: CodificationSection, [part], , provided that any class of nursery stock or of any other class of plants, fruits, vegetables, roots, bulbs, seeds, or other plant products of which the importation could be forbidden from any country or locality under the provisions of could be imported for experimental or scientific purposes by the Department of Agriculture.act Mar. 4, 1913, ch. 145, § 137 Stat. 854section 160 of this title
